name: marketing agencies managing 5–15 clients tool
description: For marketing agencies processing 5–15 clients, inefficient data collection causes missed insights. We automate data collection and analysis instead of manual data collection and analysis using spreadsheets.
problem_solved: Inefficient data collection and analysis processes for multiple clients.
